<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://www.stibosystems.com/hubfs/hub_generated/module_assets/1/186540317988/1779168159024/module_2025-tabs-selector.min.css">

<style>
  	.platform-tab-selector{
		  background-color: #fff;
	}
	.tabs-selector-bg{
		  background-color: #f9d452;
	}
  .platform-tab-selector-description-title,
  .platform-tab-selector-description-copy {
   color:#37464F;
  }
  
	.platform-tab-selector-label,.platform-tab-selector-tab-active .platform-tab-selector-label,.platform-tab-selector-label:hover{
		color:#37464F;
	}
	.platform-tab-selector-label:before{
		background-color:#37464F;
	}
  .platform-tab-selector-tabs-selector {
		cursor: grab;
		user-select: none;
		-webkit-user-select: none;
		-moz-user-select: none;
		-ms-user-select: none;
	}
	
	.platform-tab-selector-tabs-selector.dragging {
		cursor: grabbing;
		scroll-behavior: auto !important;
	}
	
	.platform-tab-selector-tabs-selector.can-drag {
		position: relative;
	}
	
	.platform-tab-selector-tabs-selector.can-drag::after {
		content: '';
		position: absolute;
		right: 10px;
		top: 50%;
		transform: translateY(-50%);
		width: 4px;
		height: 20px;
		background: linear-gradient(to bottom, transparent 0%, rgba(0,0,0,0.2) 50%, transparent 100%);
		border-radius: 2px;
		pointer-events: none;
		opacity: 0.5;
	}
</style>

<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://www.stibosystems.com/hubfs/hub_generated/module_assets/1/210681281073/1778858813288/module_2026-dynamic-report-slider.min.css">


<style>
	.featured-report{
		background-color:#fff !important;
	}

  .featured-report {
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
    isolation: isolate;
}
.bg-animation{
    position:absolute;
    inset:0;
    overflow:hidden;
    z-index:0;
    pointer-events:none;
}

.featured-report-wrapper,
.report-module-heading,
.slider-controls{
    position:relative;
    z-index:2;
}

/* GLOW */

.bg-glow{
    position:absolute;
    width:700px;
    height:700px;
    border-radius:50%;
    filter:blur(80px);
    opacity:.18;
    animation:bgPulse 10s ease-in-out infinite;
}

.bg-glow-1{
    background:#00bfd8;
    top:-250px;
    left:-200px;
}

.bg-glow-2{
    background:#00bfd8;
    bottom:-300px;
    right:-200px;
    animation-delay:4s;
}

/* WAVES */

.bg-wave{
    position:absolute;
    inset:0;
    opacity:.4;
}

.bg-wave svg{
    position:absolute;
    width:180%;
    height:180%;
    top:-30%;
    left:-30%;
}

.bg-wave path{
    fill:none;
    stroke:#00bfd8;
    stroke-width:2.6;
    opacity:.32;
    filter:blur(.2px);
}

/* ANIMATION */

.bg-wave-1 svg{
    animation:waveMove1 18s ease-in-out infinite;
}

.bg-wave-2 svg{
    animation:waveMove2 24s ease-in-out infinite;
}

.bg-wave-3 svg{
    animation:waveMove3 30s ease-in-out infinite;
}

@keyframes waveMove1{
    0%{
        transform:translate3d(0,0,0) scale(1);
    }
    50%{
        transform:translate3d(-4%,2%,0) scale(1.04);
    }
    100%{
        transform:translate3d(0,0,0) scale(1);
    }
}

@keyframes waveMove2{
    0%{
        transform:translate3d(0,0,0) scale(1);
    }
    50%{
        transform:translate3d(5%,-3%,0) scale(1.05);
    }
    100%{
        transform:translate3d(0,0,0) scale(1);
    }
}

@keyframes waveMove3{
    0%{
        transform:translate3d(0,0,0) scale(1);
    }
    50%{
        transform:translate3d(-3%,4%,0) scale(1.06);
    }
    100%{
        transform:translate3d(0,0,0) scale(1);
    }
}

@keyframes bgPulse{
    0%,100%{
        transform:scale(1);
    }
    50%{
        transform:scale(1.08);
    }
}
  .bg-fade-top,
.bg-fade-bottom{
    position:absolute;
    left:0;
    width:100%;
    height:180px;
    z-index:1;
    pointer-events:none;
}

.bg-fade-top{
    top:0;
    background:linear-gradient(
        to bottom,
        rgba(255,255,255,1) 0%,
        rgba(255,255,255,.92) 30%,
        rgba(255,255,255,0) 100%
    );
}

.bg-fade-bottom{
    bottom:0;
    background:linear-gradient(
        to top,
        rgba(255,255,255,1) 0%,
        rgba(255,255,255,.92) 30%,
        rgba(255,255,255,0) 100%
    );
}
@media (max-width: 1024px){

    .bg-wave svg{
        width:140%;
        height:140%;
        top:-10%;
        left:-10%;
    }

    .bg-wave{
        opacity:.28;
    }

    .bg-wave path{
        stroke-width:1.6;
        opacity:.22;
    }

    .bg-glow{
        width:380px;
        height:380px;
        opacity:.12;
        filter:blur(60px);
    }

    .bg-fade-top,
    .bg-fade-bottom{
        height:90px;
    }

    @keyframes waveMove1{
        0%{
            transform:translate3d(0,0,0) scale(1);
        }
        50%{
            transform:translate3d(-1.5%,1%,0) scale(1.01);
        }
        100%{
            transform:translate3d(0,0,0) scale(1);
        }
    }

    @keyframes waveMove2{
        0%{
            transform:translate3d(0,0,0) scale(1);
        }
        50%{
            transform:translate3d(2%,-1%,0) scale(1.015);
        }
        100%{
            transform:translate3d(0,0,0) scale(1);
        }
    }

    @keyframes waveMove3{
        0%{
            transform:translate3d(0,0,0) scale(1);
        }
        50%{
            transform:translate3d(-1%,1.5%,0) scale(1.02);
        }
        100%{
            transform:translate3d(0,0,0) scale(1);
        }
    }

}
  
</style>

<!-- UTM params between stibosystems.com and patfactory -->
<script>
$(function() {
  // Define which UTM parameters to track
  const utmKeys = ['utm_source', 'utm_medium', 'utm_campaign', 'utm_term', 'utm_content'];
  const urlParams = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);
  const utmParams = {};

  // Collect only existing UTM params
  utmKeys.forEach(key => {
    if (urlParams.has(key)) {
      utmParams[key] = urlParams.get(key);
    }
  });

  // If no UTM parameters present, do nothing
  if (Object.keys(utmParams).length === 0) return;

  $('a[href]').each(function() {
    try {
      const $link = $(this);
      const href = $link.attr('href');

      // Skip anchor-only links and JavaScript links
      if (!href || href.startsWith('#') || href.startsWith('javascript:')) return;

      const linkUrl = new URL(href, window.location.origin);
      const linkParams = new URLSearchParams(linkUrl.search);

      // Add UTM params if not already present
      $.each(utmParams, function(key, value) {
        if (!linkParams.has(key)) {
          linkParams.set(key, value);
        }
      });

      linkUrl.search = linkParams.toString();
      $link.attr('href', linkUrl.toString());
    } catch (e) {
      console.warn('Invalid URL skipped:', $(this).attr('href'));
    }
  });
});
</script>
<!-- end -->

<script>
//noreferrer, noopener
(function() {
document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", () => {
const links = document.querySelectorAll('a[target="_blank"]');
links.forEach(link => {
addRelAttributes(link);
});

// Mutation observer to handle dynamically added links
const observer = new MutationObserver(() => {
const newLinks = document.querySelectorAll('a[target="_blank"]:not([rel*="noopener"])');
newLinks.forEach(link => {
addRelAttributes(link);
});
});

observer.observe(document.body, { childList: true, subtree: true });

const originalWindowOpen = window.open;
window.open = function (...args) {
const newWindow = originalWindowOpen.apply(this, args);
if (newWindow && typeof newWindow === 'object') {
try {
const opener = newWindow.opener;
if (opener && typeof newWindow.opener === 'object') {
newWindow.opener = null;
}
} catch (err) {
console.error("Error resetting newWindow.opener:", err);
}
}
return newWindow;
};
});

function addRelAttributes(link) {
let rel = link.getAttribute('rel') || '';
if (!rel.includes('noopener') || !rel.includes('noreferrer')) {
const relValues = new Set(rel.split(/\s+/).filter(Boolean));
relValues.add('noopener');
relValues.add('noreferrer');
link.setAttribute('rel', Array.from(relValues).join(' ').trim());
}
}
})();
  
</script>

}
.coi-banner__wrapper {

  border-radius: 5px;
}
.coi-banner__wrapper::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb {

}
.coi-banner__wrapper::-webkit-scrollbar-track {

.coi-banner__wrapper::-webkit-scrollbar {

.coi-banner__wrapper ul,.coi-banner__wrapper ol{

.coi-banner__page {

}

}

.cookiedeclaration_wrapper p{

}
.cookiedeclaration_wrapper h2{
  font-size:25px;
}
.cookiedeclaration_wrapper h3{

}
.coi-banner__summary,
.coi-banner__cookiedeclaration,
.cookiedeclaration_wrapper{
  padding:40px;

}
.coi-banner__wrapper a[href]:not([disabled]){
  text-decoration:underline;

}
.coi-banner__wrapper a[target="_blank"]{

}

}

.coi-banner__header{
  display: flex;

}

  width: 200px;

}
.coi-banner__maintext {

}
.coi-banner__cookiedeclaration 
.coi-banner__maintext {
  white-space: normal !important;
}
.coi-banner__headline {
  display: block;

}
.coi-banner__header .coi-banner__branding {
  font-size: 9px !important;
  color:#666;
}
.coi-banner__header .coi-banner__branding a {
  display: block;
  text-decoration: none;
  color:#555 !important;
  font-size: 10px;
  font-weight:bold;
}
.coi-banner__page-footer {
  background: #FFFFFF;
  width: 100%;
  padding: 30px 40px;
  position: sticky;
  position: -webkit-sticky;
  top:0;
  bottom: 0;
  z-index: 99999;
}
.coi-button-group{
  display: flex;
  justify-content: space-between;
  width: 100%;
}
.coi-toggle-group {
  display: flex;
  justify-content: center;
}
.coi-banner__accept,
.coi-banner__decline,
.coi-banner__lastpage, 
.coi-banner__nextpage {
  color: #222;
  padding: 15px;
  text-align: center !important;
  cursor: pointer;
  font-size: 14px;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  border-radius: 3px;
  max-width: 50%;
  margin: 10px;
  border:0;
  background:none;
  transition:all 300ms ease;
  font-weight: bold;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  flex:1;
}
.coi-banner__lastpage,
.coi-banner__nextpage,
.coi-banner__decline {
  border:solid 1px #004f5f;

  color: #004f5;
}

.coi-banner__accept {
  background: #004f5f;
  color: #fff;
  text-decoration: none;
}
.coi-banner__accept:hover{
  background: #00353f;
}
.coi-button-group button:first-child,#updateButton{
  margin-left:0px;
}
.coi-button-group button:last-child{
  margin-right:0px;
}
#show_details,
#hide_details{
  color:#000000;
  margin-top:10px;
  border:0 !important;
  padding:0 !important;
  background:none !important;
  text-decoration:underline;
  cursor:pointer;
}
#hide_details,#updateButton{
  display:none;
}
.coi-banner-consent-group{
  padding:0 40px;
  display:flex;
  flex-flow:wrap;
  justify-content:space-between;
}
.coi-banner-consent-field{
  flex:1;
  display:flex;
  flex-direction:column;
  justify-content:space-between;
  border-right: solid 1px #ccc;
  padding: 20px 0;
}
.coi-banner-consent-field:last-child{
  border-right:0;
}
.coi-banner-consent-field div {
  display: flex;
  justify-content: center;
  flex:1;
}
.consent-feld-name {
  font-size: 14px;
  font-weight: 500;
  margin-bottom: 10px;
  text-align: center !important;
}

/* Consent Toggles Start*/
.coi-checkboxes{
  position:relative;
  display:flex;
  flex-direction: column-reverse;
  justify-content: space-between;
  align-items: center;
  font-weight: 500;
}
.coi-checkboxes input {
  opacity: 0 !important;
  position:absolute;
  z-index:1;
  width:100%;
  height:100%;
  cursor: pointer;
  clip:initial !important;
  left:0 !important;
  top:0 !important;
  display:block !important;
}
.coi-checkboxes .checkbox-toggle {
  background: #888888;
  width: 65px;
  height: 40px;
  border-radius: 100px;
  position: relative;
  cursor: pointer;
  transition: .3s ease;
  margin-top: 10px;
  transform-origin:center;
}
.coi-checkboxes input[type=checkbox]:checked + .checkbox-toggle {
  background: #004f5f;
}
.coi-checkboxes input[type=checkbox]:checked + .checkbox-toggle:before {
  left: 30px;
  background: #fff;
}
.coi-checkboxes input[type=checkbox]:disabled{
  cursor:not-allowed !important;
}
.coi-checkboxes input[type=checkbox]:disabled + .checkbox-toggle {
  opacity:.2;
}
.coi-checkboxes .checkbox-toggle:before {
  transition: .3s ease;
  content: '';
  width: 30px;
  height: 30px;
  position: absolute;
  background: #fff;
  left: 5px;
  top: 5px;
  box-sizing: border-box;
  color: #333;
  border-radius: 100px;
}

/* Consent Toggles End */
#coiConsentBannerCategoriesWrapper{
  background:#f6f6f6;

}

}

}

}

.coi-consent-banner__name-container

  }

@-webkit-keyframes ci-bounce {
    0%, 20%, 50%, 80%, 100% {-webkit-transform: translateY(0);}
    40% {-webkit-transform: translateY(-30px) }
    60% {-webkit-transform: translateY(-20px);}
} 
@keyframes ci-bounce {
    0%, 20%, 50%, 80%, 100% {transform: translateY(0);}
    40% {transform: translateY(-30px);}
    60% {transform: translateY(-20px);}
}
.ci-bounce {
    -webkit-animation-duration: 1s;
    animation-duration: 1s;
    -webkit-animation-name: bounce;
    animation-name: ci-bounce;
}
/** ANIMATIONS END **/

      <div class="cookiedeclaration_wrapper">
        <div class="bottom-column__why-cookies"><p style="color: #004F5F; font-size: 1.8em; line-height: 1.2em !important;font-weight: 500;">What is a cookie?</p>
<p>A cookie is a small datafile that is saved on your computer, tablet or mobile phone. A cookie is not a program that can contain harmful programs or viruses.</p> 
 
<p style="color: #004F5F; font-size: 1.8em; line-height: 1.2em !important;font-weight: 500;">How/why the homepage uses cookies</p>
<p>Cookies are necessary for the homepage to function. Cookies help us get an overview of your visit to the homepage so that we can continually optimise and adjust the homepage to your requirements and interests. For example, cookies remember what you might have added to a shopping cart, if you have previously visited the page, if you are logged in and what languages and currency you want displayed on the homepage. We also use cookies to target our ads to you on other homepages. On a very general level, cookies are used as part of our services in order to show content that is as relevant as possible to you.</p>
<p style="color: #004F5F; font-size: 1.8em; line-height: 1.2em !important;font-weight: 500;">How long are cookies saved?</p>
<p>How long cookies are saved on your device can vary. The time when they are scheduled to expire is calculated from the last date you visited the homepage. When cookies expire, they are automatically deleted. You can view a complete list of cookies below.</p>
<p style="color: #004F5F; font-size: 1.8em; line-height: 1.2em !important;font-weight: 500;">This is how you can reject or delete your cookies</p>
<p>You can always reject cookies on your computer, tablet or phone by changing your browser settings. Where these settings can be found depends on the type of browser you are using. If you do change the settings, please be aware that there will be some functions and services that you cannot use because they rely on the homepage being able to remember the choices you have made.<br>
You can choose to <a href="https://tools.google.com/dlpage/gaoptout" target="_blank" rel="noopener">not receive cookies from Google Analytics here</a>.<br>
</p>
<p style="color: #004F5F; font-size: 1.8em; line-height: 1.2em !important;font-weight: 500;">Deleting cookies</p>
<p>You can delete cookies that you have previously accepted. If you are using a PC with a recent version of a browser, you can delete your cookies by using these shortcut keys: CTRL + SHIFT + Delete.</p>
<p>If the shortcut keys do not work and/or you are using an Apple computer, you must find out what browser you are using and then click on the relevant link:</p>
<ul>
<li><a href="https://support.microsoft.com/en-us/help/17442/windows-internet-explorer-delete-manage-cookies#ie=ie-11" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Internet Explorer</a></li>
<li><a href="https://support.microsoft.com/en-us/help/4027947/microsoft-edge-delete-cookies" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Microsoft Edge</a></li>
<li><a href="https://support.mozilla.org/en-US/kb/delete-cookies-remove-info-websites-stored" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Mozilla Firefox</a></li>
<li><a href="https://support.google.com/chrome/answer/95647?hl=en" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Google Chrome</a></li>
<li><a href="https://www.opera.com/help/tutorials/security/cookies" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Opera</a></li>
<li><a href="https://support.apple.com/en-us/HT201265" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Safari</a></li>
<li><a href="https://www.macromedia.com/support/documentation/en/flashplayer/help/settings_manager07.html" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Flash cookies</a></li>
<li><a href="https://support.apple.com/en-us/HT1677" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Apple</a></li>
<li><a href="https://timeread.hubpages.com/hub/How-to-delete-internet-cookies-on-your-Droid-or-any-Android-device" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Android</a></li>
<li><a href="https://support.microsoft.com/en-us/help/11696/windows-phone-7" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Windows 7</a></li>
</ul>
 
<p>Remember: If you are using several different browsers, you must delete the cookies in all of them.</p>
<p style="color: #004F5F; font-size: 1.8em; line-height: 1.2em !important;font-weight: 500;">Do you have any questions?</p>
<p>Should you have any questions or comments in connection with this information and/or our processing of personal data, you are welcome to get in touch with us. The cookie declaration itself is updated every month via <a href="https://cookieinformation.com" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Cookie Information</a>. If you have any questions regarding the Cookie Information, you can send an email to info@cookieinformation.com.</p>
<p style="color: #004F5F; font-size: 1.8em; line-height: 1.2em !important;font-weight: 500;">Privacy Notice for STIBO A/S</p>
<p><strong>1. Contact details on Data Controller</strong></p>
<p>Name and address<br>STIBO A/S<br>Axel Kiers Vej 11<br>DK‐8270 Højbjerg<br>www.stibo.com<br>CVR no.: 78603011</p>
<p>Tel. +45 89 39 88 88<br>E‐mail: info@stibo.com</p>
<p><strong>2. Introduction</strong></p>
<p>This privacy notice describes how Stibo A/S handles and processes personal information with regard to:</p>
<ul data-rte-list="default">
<li>
<p>Visitors on the Stibo.com websites</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Handling of inquiries received via e‐mail or online forms</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Handling of job applications</p>
</li>
</ul>
<p><strong>3. Personal information</strong></p>
<p>Stibo A/S protects and respects your personal information and rights to privacy. It is always our goal to handle personal information appropriately and in line with current data protection regulations including the European General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR).</p>
<p>The purpose of this notice is to inform visitors on our websites, partners and job applicants about what personal information we collect and for what purposes.</p>
<p><strong>3.1 – Collection and processing of personal information</strong></p>
<p>Personal information is only collected to the extent necessary for the purpose for which it is being collected. The collection of personal information happens directly from you or the company or organization that you represent. We may collect the following information:</p>
<ul data-rte-list="default">
<li>
<p>IP or MAC address</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Click behaviour on the website</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Time of visit and referring location (e.g. the Site or page that offered a link to a Stibo website)</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Browsing data, statistical data and aggregated data on your page visits</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Browser and device information</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Information about marketing consent submitted through the website</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>When you submit an online form or otherwise contact us we obtain the information you provide. This will typically be your name, email address, phone number, title and the company you represent.</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>When you apply for a job with Stibo, we collect and process the information that you provide in your application, e.g. name, address, email address, phone number and CV.</p>
</li>
</ul>
<p>We collect personal information when:</p>
<ul data-rte-list="default">
<li>
<p>We receive an online inquiry from a form on the Stibo A/S website</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>You send an e‐mail to Stibo A/S or someone associated with Stibo A/S</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>You contact Stibo A/S by phone or otherwise makes an inquiry to Stibo A/S</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>You consent to receiving marketing material from Stibo A/S</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>You visit the Stibo.com website</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>You apply for a job with Stibo A/S</p>
</li>
</ul>
<p><strong>3.2 – Purposes for processing of personal information</strong></p>
<p>Personal information is processed for the following purposes:</p>
<ul data-rte-list="default">
<li>
<p>Managing and maintaining the Stibo A/S’s business relations</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Evaluation, answering and following up on job applications</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Operation and improvement of the Stibo.com website</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Performing security assessments to ensure an appropriate level of IT security to protect your information and vital interests, e.g. to notify any relevant individuals or authorities in case of a data breach</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Customer service and general communication</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Establishment, exercise and defense of legal claims</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Marketing purposes, including direct marketing</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Surveys, statistics, development and protection of our services</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Stibo A/S does not make any automated decisions based on personal information provided to us.</p>
</li>
</ul>
<p><strong>3.3 – Legal basis for processing personal information</strong></p>
<p>The legal basis for processing personal information to the above purposes:</p>
<ul data-rte-list="default">
<li>
<p>Performance of our contractual obligation, e.g. evaluation and responding to job applications and inquiries. Art. 6 (1) (b) of th GDPR</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Where you have provided your consent for receiving information from Stibo A/S. Art. 6 (1) (a) of the GDPR</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>A legitimate interest where the purpose of processing is to improve our service and communication to the benefit of interested parties and visitors on the Stibo.com website. Art. 6 (1) (f) of the GDPR</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Our obligation to notify the relevant supervisory authority and/or you in case of IT security incidents. Art. 6 (1) (c) of the GDPR</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>A legitimate interest in performing security assessments to ensure an appropriate level of IT security. Art. 6(1)(f) of the GDPR.</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>A legitimate interest in ensuring customer service ins general communication. Art. 6(1)(f) of the GDPR.</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>A legitimate interest in establishing, exercising or defending a legal claim. Art. 6(1)(f).</p>
</li>
</ul>
<p><strong>3.4 – Revocations of consent</strong></p>
<p>Where the processing is based on your consent, you have the right to revoke this consent at any time. Withdrawal of your consent will not affect the lawfulness of the processing prior to the withdrawal.</p>
<p><strong>3.5 – Protection of personal information</strong></p>
<p>All personal information is stored in secure systems with user access control mechanisms. These systems are periodically checked, and all employees associated with Stibo A/S follow internal rules and procedures for handling personal information.</p>
<p><strong>3.6 – Data retention</strong></p>
<p>Personal information is stored as long as it is necessary for the purpose to which it has been collected. In some cases, the Stibo A/S has a legal obligation to store the information longer.</p>
<p>All received job applications that do not lead to employment will be stored for no longer than 6 months, unless you have provided your consent for a longer storage period. Exceptions are made where an applicant has provided a consent for Stibo Systems to keep the information for future job openings e.g. for the purpose of keeping a talent pool.</p>
<p><strong>3.7 – Third parties</strong></p>
<p>In connection with Stibo A/S’ development, the company structure may change, e.g. full or partial sale of Stibo A/S. In case of a partial hand over of assets containing personal data, the legal basis for the related disclosure of personal data is, as a general rule, Article 6 (1) (f) of the GDPR, as Stibo A/S has a legitimate interest in handing over part of its assets as well as making commercial changes.</p>
<p>Aside from above, Stibo A/S as a general rule never publishes, sells or discloses any personal information to a third party without your consent unless the company has a legal obligation to do so. However, under certain circumstances and in accordance with applicable law, we may need to disclose your personal data to the police, lawyers, auditors, courts, public authorities or affiliated companies.</p>
<p>To fulfill the purposes mentioned above, Stibo A/S uses external partners who, on the basis of a contractual relationship with Stibo A/S provide relevant services, e.g. IT solutions and hosting of the website. Such service providers will only process personal data in accordance with our instructions pursuant to the data processor agreements entered into.</p>
<p>Your personal data is not transferred to data controllers or data processors located outside the EU/EEA.</p>
<p><strong>4. Your rights</strong></p>
<p>With the limitations set forth in the GDPR, you can always submit a request to exercise your rights regarding your personal information. Depending on the situation, this includes the right to ask about what personal information Stibo A/S holds on you, to rectify any wrong personal information or ask to get your personal information deleted. You also have the right to restrict any processing of your personal information or to get a copy of your information.</p>
<p>If you have any questions, you are always welcome to contact Stibo A/S on the following e‐mail address: info@stibo.com</p>
<p><strong>5. Changes to this privacy notice</strong></p>
<p>This privacy notice is updated occasionally when relevant.</p>
<p><strong>6. Contact or complaints</strong></p>
<p>If the above information leaves you with any questions, please send an e‐mail to info@stibo.com or call Stibo A/S on phone no.: +45 89 39 88 88</p>
<p>You have a right to complain about our processing of your personal data to the Danish supervisory authority. If you wish to make a complaint to the Danish Supervisory Authority, you can find more information on how to do this by visiting www.datatilsynet.dk</p>
<br>

Template name: Overlay v2
URI: https://cookieinformation.com

var coiOverlay = document.getElementById('coiOverlay');
var wrapper = document.getElementById('coi-banner-wrapper');
var renewBtn = document.getElementById('Coi-Renew');

/* LOGO FUNCTION START */

/* LOGO FUNCTION END */

function trapFocusInModal(modal){
  modal = document.getElementById(modal);
  var focusableEl = modal.querySelectorAll('button:not([disabled]), a[href]:not([disabled]), input:not([disabled]), select, textarea:not([disabled]), [tabindex]:not([tabindex="-1"])');
  var firstFocusableEl = focusableEl[0];
  var lastFocusableEl = focusableEl[focusableEl.length - 1];
  var KEYCODE_TAB = 9;
  wrapper.focus();
  
  function ctlFocus(e){
    var isTabPressed = (e.key === 'Tab' || e.keyCode === KEYCODE_TAB);
        if (!isTabPressed) { 
            return; 
        }
        if ( e.shiftKey ) /* shift + tab */ {
            if (document.activeElement === firstFocusableEl) {
                lastFocusableEl.focus();
                e.preventDefault();
            }
        } else /* tab */ {
            if (document.activeElement === lastFocusableEl) {
                firstFocusableEl.focus();
                e.preventDefault();
            }
        }
  }
  if (window.addEventListener) {
    modal.addEventListener('keydown', ctlFocus);
  }else if (document.attachEvent) { // IE 
    modal.attachEvent("onkeydown", ctlFocus);
  }else{
    modal.addEventListener('keydown', ctlFocus);
  }
}

function checkState(){
  var checked = document.querySelectorAll('.coi__checkbox:not(#cookie_cat_necessary):checked');
    if(checked.length > 0){
      setConsentOption(true);
    }else{
      setConsentOption(false);
    }
}
var checkboxes = document.querySelectorAll('.coi__checkbox:not(#cookie_cat_necessary)');
for(var i = 0; i < checkboxes.length; i++){
  checkboxes[i].addEventListener('change', function(el) {
    checkState();
  });
}


function setConsentOption(state){
  var updateButton  = document.getElementById('updateButton');
  var declineButton = document.getElementById('declineButton');
  
  if(state){
    declineButton.style.display = 'none';
    updateButton.style.display = 'flex';
    updateButton.setAttribute('role','alert');
    updateButton.setAttribute('aria-atomic','true');
    declineButton.removeAttribute('role');
  }else{
    updateButton.style.display = 'none';
    declineButton.style.display = 'flex';
    declineButton.setAttribute('role','alert');
    declineButton.setAttribute('aria-atomic','true');
    updateButton.removeAttribute('role');
    updateButton.removeAttribute('aria-atomic');
  }
}

//Toggles the menu tabs in banner
function TogglePage(id,element){
  var i, tabcontent, tablinks;
  tabcontent = document.getElementsByClassName("coi-banner__page");
    for (i = 0; i < tabcontent.length; i++) {
        tabcontent[i].style.display = "none";
    }
  // Get all elements with class="coi-banner-tab" and remove the class "active"
    tablinks = document.getElementsByClassName("coi-banner__nextpage");
    for (i = 0; i < tablinks.length; i++) {
        tablinks[i].className = tablinks[i].className.replace(" activeTab", "");
    }
  // Show the current tab, and add an "active" class to the link that opened the tab
    document.getElementById(element).style.display = "block";
    trapFocusInModal(element);
    id.className += " activeTab";
}

function toggleDetails(id){
  var categorieWrapper  = document.getElementById('coiConsentBannerCategoriesWrapper');
  var coiShowDetails    = document.getElementById('show_details');
  var coiHideDetails    = document.getElementById('hide_details');
  var CoiCategory       = document.querySelectorAll('.coi-consent-banner__category-name');
  var CoiCategoryTab    = document.querySelectorAll('.coi-consent-banner__description-container');
  
  if(id === 'show_details'){
    coiShowDetails.style.display = 'none';
    coiHideDetails.style.display = 'block';
    categorieWrapper.style.minHeight = categorieWrapper.scrollHeight + "px";
    categorieWrapper.setAttribute('aria-hidden','false');
    categorieWrapper.setAttribute('tabindex',0);
    for(var i = 0; i < CoiCategory.length; i++){
      CoiCategory[i].setAttribute('tabindex',0);
    }
    CoiCategory[0].focus();
    wrapper.scrollTop = categorieWrapper.offsetTop;
  }else{
    coiShowDetails.style.display = 'block';
    coiHideDetails.style.display = 'none';
    categorieWrapper.style.minHeight = 0;
    categorieWrapper.setAttribute('aria-hidden','true');
    categorieWrapper.setAttribute('tabindex',-1);
    for(var i = 0; i < CoiCategory.length; i++){
      CoiCategory[i].setAttribute('tabindex',-1);
      CoiCategory[i].classList.remove('ci-btn-tab-active');
    }
    for(var i = 0; i < CoiCategoryTab.length; i++){
      if(CoiCategoryTab[i].classList.contains('tab-panel-active')){
        CoiCategoryTab[i].classList.remove('tab-panel-active');
      }
    }
    wrapper.scrollTop = wrapper.offsetTop;
  }
}

function toggleCookieDetails(btn,tab){
  var tabContent = document.getElementById(tab);
  btn.classList.toggle("ci-btn-tab-active");
  if(btn.getAttribute('aria-expanded') === 'false'){
    btn.setAttribute('aria-expanded','true');
  }else{
    btn.setAttribute('aria-expanded','false');
  }
  
  tabContent.classList.toggle("tab-panel-active");
  if(tabContent.getAttribute('aria-hidden') === 'false'){
    tabContent.setAttribute('aria-hidden','true');
  }else{
    tabContent.setAttribute('aria-hidden','false');
  }
  
  if(!tabContent.classList.contains('tab-panel-active')){
    var links = tabContent.querySelectorAll('a');
    for(var i = 0; i < links.length; i++){
      links[i].setAttribute('tabindex',-1);
    }
  }else{
    var links = tabContent.querySelectorAll(' a');
    for(var i = 0; i < links.length; i++){
      links[i].setAttribute('tabindex',0);
    }
  }
}

coiOverlay.addEventListener("click", function(e) {
  if (e.target == this){
  e.preventDefault;
  wrapper.classList.remove("ci-bounce");
  wrapper.offsetWidth = coiOverlay.offsetWidth;
  wrapper.classList.add("ci-bounce");
  }
}, false);

window.addEventListener('CookieInformationConsentGiven', function(event) {
    var consentplaceholders = document.getElementsByClassName('consent-placeholder');
    if(consentplaceholders){
        for(var i = 0; i < consentplaceholders.length; i++){
            if(!CookieInformation.getConsentGivenFor(consentplaceholders[i].getAttribute('data-category'))){
                consentplaceholders[i].style.display = 'block';
            }else{
                consentplaceholders[i].style.display = 'none';
            }
        }
    }
}, false);

function setNoScroll(state){
  var htmlElement = document.getElementsByTagName('html')[0];
  if(state){
    htmlElement.classList.add('noScroll');
  }else{
    htmlElement.classList.remove('noScroll');
  }
}

// Show and Hides the banner
  function showCookieBanner() {
    coiOverlay.style.display = 'flex';
    setNoScroll(true);
    wrapper.setAttribute('aria-hidden','false');
    coiOverlay.setAttribute('aria-hidden','false');
    setTimeout(function(){
      trapFocusInModal('coiPage-1');
    },100);
    checkState();
    
    renewBtn.style.display = 'none';
  }

  function hideCookieBanner() { 
    wrapper.setAttribute('aria-hidden','true');
    coiOverlay.setAttribute('aria-hidden','true');
    coiOverlay.style.display = 'none';
    setNoScroll(false);
    
    renewBtn.style.display = 'block';
  }</script></div><div id="hs-web-interactives-top-push-anchor" class="go3670563033"></div>

        if (!isVoiceSearchSupported) {
            // Add a class to indicate voice search is not supported
            document.documentElement.classList.add('no-voice-search');
            
            console.log('Voice search is not supported in this browser');

            document.documentElement.classList.add('voice-search-supported');

    });

<div id="hs_cos_wrapper_module_176606502782699" class="hs_cos_wrapper hs_cos_wrapper_widget hs_cos_wrapper_type_module" style="" data-hs-cos-general-type="widget" data-hs-cos-type="module"><script>
// LocalStorage Setup
 
const LS_KEY = "stibo_user_journey";

function getJourney() {
  const raw = localStorage.getItem(LS_KEY);
  if (!raw) return null;

  try {
    return JSON.parse(raw);
  } catch (e) {
    console.warn("Journey LS parse error:", e);
    return null;
  }
}

function saveJourney(obj) {
  try {
    localStorage.setItem(LS_KEY, JSON.stringify(obj));
  } catch (e) {
    console.warn("Journey LS save error:", e);
  }
}



// Visit Source Detection
	
function getVisitSource() {
  const url = new URL(window.location.href);

  // UTMs take highest priority
  if (url.searchParams.get("utm_source")) {
    return url.searchParams.get("utm_source");
  }

  const ref = document.referrer;
  if (!ref) return "direct";

  const refHost = new URL(ref).hostname;
  const thisHost = window.location.hostname;

  if (refHost === thisHost) return "internal";
  if (refHost.includes("google") || refHost.includes("bing")) return "organic";
  if (refHost.includes("facebook") || refHost.includes("linkedin")) return "social";

  return "referral";
}



// Page Metadata
	
function getPageName() {
  return document.title || "";
}

function getVisitDate() {
  const now = new Date();
  const yyyy = now.getFullYear();
  const mm = String(now.getMonth() + 1).padStart(2, "0");
  const dd = String(now.getDate()).padStart(2, "0");
  return `${yyyy}-${mm}-${dd}`;
}

function getPageType() {
  const slug = window.location.pathname;

  // override for resource pages
  if (slug.includes("/resources/")) {
    return "resource";
  }

  const type = "standard-page";

  if (type === "standard-page") {
    return "website-page";
  }

  return type;
}


function getJourneyStage() {
  const pageUrl = window.location.pathname.toLowerCase();

  const stage = "";

  if (stage !== "") {
    return stage; 
  }

  if (
    pageUrl.includes("/solution/") ||
    pageUrl.includes("/industry/") ||
    pageUrl.includes("/platform/") ||
    pageUrl.includes("/resources/")
  ) {
    return "evaluate";
  }

  if (
    pageUrl.includes("/contact") ||
    pageUrl.includes("/demo") ||
    pageUrl.includes("/pricing")
  ) {
    return "commit";
  }

  // 3. Default fallback
  return "discover";
}




// detect clicked <a> classList
let lastAssetClicked = null;

document.addEventListener("click", (event) => {
  const link = event.target.closest("a");
  if (!link) return;

  const classes = link.className.trim();
  if (!classes) return;

  // Save instantly into LS so navigation won't delete it
  try {
    localStorage.setItem("stibo_last_asset_click", classes);
  } catch(e) {}

  lastAssetClicked = classes;
});




// First page visit
 
function initFirstVisit() {
  let j = getJourney();
  if (j) return; 

  const firstVisit = {
    page_url: window.location.href,
    page_type: getPageType(),
    page_name: getPageName(),
    visit_date: getVisitDate(),
    visit_source: getVisitSource(),
    journey_stage: getJourneyStage(),
    conversion_day: null,
    asset_type_clicked: null
  };

  j = {
    lead_status: "pre-lead",
    first_page_visited: firstVisit,
    continuous_visits: []
  };

  saveJourney(j);
}

initFirstVisit();



// Continuous visit tracking
	
function logContinuousVisit() {
  const j = getJourney();
  if (!j) return;

  const firstUrl = j.first_page_visited?.page_url;

  if (j.continuous_visits.length === 0 && window.location.href === firstUrl) {
    return;
  }

  const storedClick = localStorage.getItem("stibo_last_asset_click");

  const entry = {
    page_url: window.location.href,
    page_type: getPageType(),
    page_name: getPageName(),
    visit_date: getVisitDate(),
    visit_source: getVisitSource(),
    journey_stage: getJourneyStage(),
    conversion_day: null,
    asset_type_clicked: storedClick || lastAssetClicked
  };

  localStorage.removeItem("stibo_last_asset_click");

  j.continuous_visits.push(entry);
  saveJourney(j);
}
logContinuousVisit()



// Form submission logic

function calculateConversionDay(firstDateStr) {
  const first = new Date(firstDateStr);
  const now = new Date();
  const diff = Math.floor((now - first) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24));
  return diff + 1; // Day 1 = first day
}

window.addEventListener("message", function(event) {
    const j = getJourney();
    if (!j) return;

    // --------------------------
    // A) FORM READY → fill fields BEFORE HubSpot reads values
    // --------------------------
    if (
        event.data &&
        event.data.type === "hsFormCallback" &&
        event.data.eventName === "onFormReady"
    ) {
			const first = j.first_page_visited;
        first.conversion_day = calculateConversionDay(first.visit_date);

        setHS("first_conversion_day", first.conversion_day);
        fillHubspotHiddenFields(j);
			
    }

    // --------------------------
    // B) BEFORE SUBMIT → calculate conversion day + replace hidden field
    // --------------------------
    if (
        event.data &&
        event.data.type === "hsFormCallback" &&
        event.data.eventName === "onBeforeFormSubmit"
    ) {

        saveJourney(j);
    }

    // --------------------------
    // C) AFTER SUBMIT → update LS only
    // --------------------------
    if (
        event.data &&
        event.data.type === "hsFormCallback" &&
        event.data.eventName === "onFormSubmit"
    ) {
        j.lead_status = "lead";
        saveJourney(j);
    }

});




// Hidden form fields injection
function fillHubspotHiddenFields(journey) {
  const first = journey.first_page_visited;
  const last = journey.continuous_visits[journey.continuous_visits.length - 1] || first;

  setHS("first_page_url", first.page_url);
  setHS("first_page_type", first.page_type);
  setHS("first_page_name", first.page_name);
  setHS("first_visit_date", first.visit_date);
  setHS("first_visit_source", first.visit_source);
  
  setHS("first_journey_stage", first.journey_stage);
  setHS("first_asset_type_clicked", first.asset_type_clicked);

  setHS("last_page_url", last.page_url);
  setHS("last_page_type", last.page_type);
  setHS("last_page_name", last.page_name);
  setHS("last_visit_source", last.visit_source);
  setHS("last_asset_type", last.asset_type_clicked);
}

function setHS(name, value) {
  const el = document.querySelector(`input[name="${name}"]`);
	if (el) el.value = value || "";
}

</script></div>

        <div class="platform-tab-selector-content tab-number-2" style="display:none"> 
          <div class="platform-tab-selector-content-left" style="flex: 0 0 100%; background-color:">
            <h3 class="platform-tab-selector-content-left-title" style="color:">
              Real-time accuracy for agentic workflows 
            </h3>
            <div class="platform-tab-selector-content-left-description richtext_link" style="color:">
              <p>Agentic workflows operate in the present tense. And so should your data. Overnight batch pipelines work for dashboards, but they don’t work for agents making autonomous decisions at runtime. STEP validates and enriches records at ingestion and propagates updates. That way, downstream systems and agents aren’t dependent on polling or stale reads. </p>
            </div>
						
          </div>
          
        </div>
      
        <div class="platform-tab-selector-content tab-number-3" style="display:none"> 
          <div class="platform-tab-selector-content-left" style="flex: 0 0 100%; background-color:">
            <h3 class="platform-tab-selector-content-left-title" style="color:">
              Governance that makes autonomy defensible 
            </h3>
            <div class="platform-tab-selector-content-left-description richtext_link" style="color:">
              <p>When an agent can make autonomous decisions, it must be traceable, reversible and accountable.  <br><br>STEP enforces role-based access control and captures an auditable history of changes. No record reaches the master store without passing defined validation, approval and enrichment steps, whether the trigger is a human steward or an automated agent. <br><br> This is the control plane that makes agentic automation explainable and defensible.  </p>
            </div>
						
          </div>
          
        </div>
      
        <div class="platform-tab-selector-content tab-number-4" style="display:none"> 
          <div class="platform-tab-selector-content-left" style="flex: 0 0 100%; background-color:">
            <h3 class="platform-tab-selector-content-left-title" style="color:">
              Interoperability from source to agent 
            </h3>
            <div class="platform-tab-selector-content-left-description richtext_link" style="color:">
              <p>Data flows in from anywhere. Intelligence flows out to everything. STEP connects to ERP systems, CRM platforms and more through a library of more than 100 prebuilt connectors. STEP brings your data in from wherever it lives and resolves and governs it into trusted master records, then serves it downstream. All while remaining platform-agnostic. <br><br>Agents don’t need custom integrations to reach master data. Stibo Systems MCP Server lets AI agents query, retrieve and act on your master data using the same protocol they use across the rest of their tool ecosystem. </p>
            </div>
						
          </div>
          
        </div>
      
        <div class="platform-tab-selector-content tab-number-5" style="display:none"> 
          <div class="platform-tab-selector-content-left" style="flex: 0 0 100%; background-color:">
            <h3 class="platform-tab-selector-content-left-title" style="color:">
              Semantic relationships for cross-domain reasoning 
            </h3>
            <div class="platform-tab-selector-content-left-description richtext_link" style="color:">
              <p>Agents need to understand relationships, not just retrieve values. STEP’s support for a semantic data graph isn't an add-on — it's enabled by the platform’s foundational data model capabilities. Every entity exists as nodes in graph structure with typed, directional relationships, configurable hierarchies and attribute inheritance.  <br><br>Semantic meaning is captured through governed relationship definitions, metadata, and ontologies or classification schemes that can be applied across any domain. This lets agents and AI systems interpret meaning from explicit structure instead of inference.  </p>
            </div>
						
          </div>
          
        </div>
      
        <div class="platform-tab-selector-content tab-number-6" style="display:none"> 
          <div class="platform-tab-selector-content-left" style="flex: 0 0 100%; background-color:#fff">
            <h3 class="platform-tab-selector-content-left-title" style="color:#004F5F">
              Enterprise scale for agentic operations 
            </h3>
            <div class="platform-tab-selector-content-left-description richtext_link" style="color:#004F5F">
              Production agentic estates hit MDM infrastructure hard. More agents means more concurrent requests, tighter freshness requirements, and higher data volumes. STEP runs on Microsoft Azure with a multi-tenant, cloud-native architecture that scales with that demand. And because STEP manages master data across the full enterprise rather than a single domain, agents always work from a single, consistent record — not conflicting versions from siloed systems. 
            </div>
						
          </div>
          
        </div>
      
    </div>
  </div>
  </div>
</section>


</div>

<script>
document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function () {
  const module = document.querySelector(".widget_1743649159329");
  if (!module) return;

  let isTabSwitching = false;
  const tabSwitchDelay = 300;
  
  let isDragging = false;
  let startX = 0;
  let scrollLeft = 0;
  let hasDragged = false;

  const $module = $(module);
  const $tabs = $module.find(".platform-tab-selector-tab");
  const $contents = $module.find(".platform-tab-selector-content");
  const $tabsContainer = $module.find(".platform-tab-selector-tabs-selector");

  const firstTab = $tabs.first();
  firstTab.addClass("platform-tab-selector-tab-active");
  $module.find(`.platform-tab-selector-content.${firstTab.prop("classList")[1]}`).show();

  function checkIfDragNeeded() {
    const container = $tabsContainer[0];
    if (container.scrollWidth > container.clientWidth) {
      $tabsContainer.addClass('can-drag');
       $tabsContainer.css('justify-content', 'flex-start');
      return true;
    } else {
      $tabsContainer.removeClass('can-drag');
      return false;
    }
  }

  function scrollToActiveTab(targetTab) {
    if (!targetTab || !$tabsContainer.length) return;

    const container = $tabsContainer[0];
    const tab = targetTab[0];
    
    const containerRect = container.getBoundingClientRect();
    const tabRect = tab.getBoundingClientRect();
    
    const containerLeft = containerRect.left;
    const containerRight = containerRect.right;
    const tabLeft = tabRect.left;
    const tabRight = tabRect.right;
    
    if (tabRight > containerRight) {
      const scrollAmount = tabRight - containerRight + 20;
      container.scrollBy({
        left: scrollAmount,
        behavior: 'smooth'
      });
    }
    else if (tabLeft < containerLeft) {
      const scrollAmount = containerLeft - tabLeft + 20; 
      container.scrollBy({
        left: -scrollAmount,
        behavior: 'smooth'
      });
    }
  }

  function switchTab(targetTab) {
    if (isTabSwitching || !targetTab || hasDragged) return;

    isTabSwitching = true;

    const currentActiveTabClass = $tabs.filter(".platform-tab-selector-tab-active").prop("classList")[1];
    const currentContent = $module.find(`.platform-tab-selector-content.${currentActiveTabClass}`);
    const targetContent = $module.find(`.platform-tab-selector-content.${targetTab.prop("classList")[1]}`);

    $tabs.removeClass("platform-tab-selector-tab-active");
    targetTab.addClass("platform-tab-selector-tab-active");

    scrollToActiveTab(targetTab);

    $contents.stop(true, true);

    currentContent.fadeOut(200, function () {
      targetContent.fadeIn(300, function () {
        setTimeout(() => {
          isTabSwitching = false;
        }, tabSwitchDelay);
      });
    });
  }

  $tabsContainer.on('mousedown', function(e) {
    if (!checkIfDragNeeded()) return;
    
    if ($(e.target).closest('.platform-tab-selector-tab').length > 0) return;
    
    isDragging = true;
    hasDragged = false;
    startX = e.pageX;
    scrollLeft = this.scrollLeft;
    $tabsContainer.addClass('dragging');
    e.preventDefault();
  });

  $(document).on('mousemove', function(e) {
    if (!isDragging) return;
    
    e.preventDefault();
    const x = e.pageX;
    const walk = startX - x;
    const newScrollLeft = scrollLeft + walk;
    
    $tabsContainer[0].scrollLeft = newScrollLeft;
    
    if (Math.abs(walk) > 5) {
      hasDragged = true;
    }
  });

  $(document).on('mouseup', function() {
    if (isDragging) {
      isDragging = false;
      $tabsContainer.removeClass('dragging');
      
      setTimeout(() => {
        hasDragged = false;
      }, 50);
    }
  });

  let touchStartX = 0;
  let touchScrollLeft = 0;

  $tabsContainer.on('touchstart', function(e) {
    if (!checkIfDragNeeded()) return;
    
    if ($(e.target).closest('.platform-tab-selector-tab').length > 0) return;
    
    touchStartX = e.originalEvent.touches[0].pageX;
    touchScrollLeft = this.scrollLeft;
    hasDragged = false;
  });

  $tabsContainer.on('touchmove', function(e) {
    if (touchStartX === 0) return;
    
    const touchX = e.originalEvent.touches[0].pageX;
    const walk = touchStartX - touchX;
    this.scrollLeft = touchScrollLeft + walk;
    
    if (Math.abs(walk) > 10) {
      hasDragged = true;
    }
  });

  $tabsContainer.on('touchend', function() {
    touchStartX = 0;
    touchScrollLeft = 0;
    
    setTimeout(() => {
      hasDragged = false;
    }, 50);
  });

  $tabs.on("click", function (e) {
    if (hasDragged) {
      e.preventDefault();
      return;
    }
    switchTab($(this));
  });

  $tabs.on("keydown", function (e) {
    let targetTab;
    const currentIndex = $tabs.index($(this));

    if (e.key === "ArrowRight" && currentIndex < $tabs.length - 1) {
      targetTab = $tabs.eq(currentIndex + 1);
    } else if (e.key === "ArrowLeft" && currentIndex > 0) {
      targetTab = $tabs.eq(currentIndex - 1);
    } else if (e.key === "Tab") {
      if (e.shiftKey && currentIndex > 0) {
        targetTab = $tabs.eq(currentIndex - 1);
      } else if (!e.shiftKey && currentIndex < $tabs.length - 1) {
        targetTab = $tabs.eq(currentIndex + 1);
      }
    }

    if (targetTab && targetTab.length > 0) {
      e.preventDefault();
      e.stopPropagation();

      if (!isTabSwitching) {
        targetTab.focus();
        switchTab(targetTab);
      }
    }
  });

  $module.on("keydown", function (e) {
    if (isTabSwitching && (e.key === "ArrowRight" || e.key === "ArrowLeft" || e.key === "Tab")) {
      e.preventDefault();
      e.stopImmediatePropagation();
      return;
    }

    const focusedTab = $tabs.filter(":focus");
    if (focusedTab.length > 0) {
      const currentIndex = $tabs.index(focusedTab);

      if (
        (e.key === "ArrowLeft" && currentIndex === 0) ||
        (e.key === "ArrowRight" && currentIndex === $tabs.length - 1) ||
        (e.key === "Tab" && e.shiftKey && currentIndex === 0) ||
        (e.key === "Tab" && !e.shiftKey && currentIndex === $tabs.length - 1)
      ) {
        e.preventDefault();
        e.stopImmediatePropagation();
      }
    }
  });
  function getTabFromURL() {
    const hash = window.location.hash;
    if (hash.includes('?tab=')) {
      const tabNumber = parseInt(hash.split('?tab=')[1]);
      return tabNumber;
    }
    return null;
  }

  function activateTabByNumber(tabNumber) {
    if (tabNumber && tabNumber > 0 && tabNumber <= $tabs.length) {
      const targetTab = $tabs.eq(tabNumber - 1);
      if (targetTab.length) {
        switchTab(targetTab);
        setTimeout(() => {
          const moduleTop = $module.offset().top - 80;
          $('html, body').animate({ scrollTop: moduleTop }, 600);
        }, 100);
      }
    }
  }

  const initialTab = getTabFromURL();
  if (initialTab) {
    activateTabByNumber(initialTab);
  }

  $(window).on('hashchange', function() {
    const hash = window.location.hash;
    const moduleId = '#';
    if (hash.startsWith(moduleId)) {
      const tabNumber = getTabFromURL();
      activateTabByNumber(tabNumber);
    }
  });
  checkIfDragNeeded();
  $(window).on('resize', checkIfDragNeeded);
});

</script>

<script>
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function () {

  const section = document.querySelector('#resources-widget_1743650463194');
  if (!section) return;

  const sliderEl = section.querySelector('.resources-swiper-widget_1743650463194');
  const scrollbarEl = section.querySelector('.swiper-scrollbar-widget_1743650463194');

  if (!sliderEl) return;

  let swiper = null;

  function initSwiper() {
    if (swiper) return;
    swiper = new Swiper(sliderEl, {
      
      slidesPerView: 3,
      
      spaceBetween: 74,
      keyboard: {
        enabled: true,
      },
      navigation: {
        nextEl: '.swiper-button-next',
        prevEl: '.swiper-button-prev'
      },
      scrollbar: {
        el: scrollbarEl,
        draggable: true,
        snapOnRelease: true,
      },
      breakpoints: {
        1025: {
          
          slidesPerView: 3,
          
          spaceBetween: 74
        },
        769: {
          slidesPerView: 2,
          spaceBetween: 74
        }
      },
      mousewheel: {
        forceToAxis: true
      }
    });
  }

  function destroySwiper() {
    if (swiper) {
      swiper.destroy(true, true);
      swiper = null;
    }
  }

  function checkScreenWidth() {
    if (window.innerWidth > 768) {
      initSwiper();
    } else {
      destroySwiper();
    }
  }

  checkScreenWidth();
  window.addEventListener('resize', checkScreenWidth);

});
</script>

<!-- Full Story chatbot tracking -->
<!-- HubSpot Chat -> Fullstory tracking: conversation + quick replies only -->
<script>
(function trackHubSpotChatInFullstory() {
  var SCRIPT_VERSION = '1.0.0';
  var listenersAttached = false;
  var lastEventKeys = {};

  function nowIso() {
    return new Date().toISOString();
  }

  function isFullstoryAvailable() {
    return typeof window.FS === 'function';
  }

  function cleanString(value, maxLength) {
    if (value == null) return '';

    var text = Array.isArray(value) ? value.join(', ') : String(value);
    text = text.replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim();

    if (maxLength && text.length > maxLength) {
      return text.slice(0, maxLength);
    }

    return text;
  }

  function getConversationId(payload) {
    var id =
      payload &&
      payload.conversation &&
      payload.conversation.conversationId;

    return id == null ? '' : String(id);
  }

  function dedupe(key, ttlMs) {
    var now = Date.now();
    var previous = lastEventKeys[key] || 0;

    if (now - previous < ttlMs) {
      return false;
    }

    lastEventKeys[key] = now;
    return true;
  }

  function trackFullstoryEvent(name, properties, dedupeKey, dedupeTtlMs) {
    if (dedupeKey && !dedupe(dedupeKey, dedupeTtlMs || 1000)) {
      return;
    }

    if (!isFullstoryAvailable()) {
      return;
    }

    window.FS('trackEvent', {
      name: name,
      properties: Object.assign(
        {
          source: 'hubspot_chat',
          script_version: SCRIPT_VERSION,
          tracked_at: nowIso(),
          page_url: window.location.href,
          page_path: window.location.pathname
        },
        properties || {}
      )
    });
  }

  function bindHubSpotEvents() {
    if (listenersAttached) return;

    if (!window.HubSpotConversations) {
      return;
    }

    listenersAttached = true;

    window.HubSpotConversations.on('conversationStarted', function(payload) {
      var conversationId = getConversationId(payload);

      trackFullstoryEvent(
        'HubSpot Chat Conversation Started',
        {
          conversation_id: conversationId
        },
        'conversation_started:' + conversationId,
        3000
      );
    });

    window.HubSpotConversations.on('userSelectedThread', function(payload) {
      var conversationId = getConversationId(payload);

      trackFullstoryEvent(
        'HubSpot Chat Thread Selected',
        {
          conversation_id: conversationId
        },
        'thread_selected:' + conversationId,
        3000
      );
    });

    window.HubSpotConversations.on('quickReplyButtonClick', function(payload) {
      var values = payload && Array.isArray(payload.value)
        ? payload.value.map(function(item) {
            return cleanString(item, 250);
          })
        : [];

      var firstValue = values[0] || '';

      trackFullstoryEvent(
        'HubSpot Chat Quick Reply Clicked',
        {
          quick_reply_text: firstValue,
          quick_reply_values: values,
          quick_reply_name: cleanString(payload && payload.name, 100),
          quick_reply_multi_select: Boolean(payload && payload.multiSelect)
        },
        'quick_reply:' + firstValue,
        500
      );
    });

    window.HubSpotConversations.on('conversationClosed', function(payload) {
      var conversationId = getConversationId(payload);

      trackFullstoryEvent(
        'HubSpot Chat Conversation Closed',
        {
          conversation_id: conversationId
        },
        'conversation_closed:' + conversationId,
        3000
      );
    });
  }

  if (window.HubSpotConversations) {
    bindHubSpotEvents();
  } else {
    window.hsConversationsOnReady = window.hsConversationsOnReady || [];
    window.hsConversationsOnReady.push(bindHubSpotEvents);
  }
})();
</script>

<!-- end -->
